body_excerpt: In retrieve_ptr_limit and related functions of verifier.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In retrieve_ptr_limit and related functions of verifier.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution
